description: SubFrame - Module structure and IPC communication map

main/activityManager.description: Activity Manager — Centralized execution/output manager for SubFrame.

main/agentStateManager.description: Agent State Manager Module Watches .subframe/agent-state.json for changes and broadcasts real-time agent state updates to the renderer via IPC.

emptyState.purpose: Build an empty agent state payload for a project

loadAgentState.purpose: Returns empty state if the file is missing or malformed.

watchAgentState.purpose: Start watching the .subframe/ directory for agent-state.json changes.

main/aiFilesManager.description: AI Files Manager Module Handles native AI instruction file operations (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) Manages backlink injection, removal, symlink migration, and status checks

getAIFilesStatus.purpose: Get status of all AI-related files in a project

handleInjectBacklink.purpose: Inject backlink into a native AI file

handleRemoveBacklink.purpose: Remove backlink from a native AI file

handleCreateNativeFile.purpose: Create a new native AI file with backlink

handleMigrateSymlink.purpose: Migrate a symlink to a real file with backlink

handleVerifyOnProjectOpen.purpose: Auto-verify backlinks when a project is opened

buildBacklinkOptions.purpose: Build backlink options from config (returns undefined if no customization)

handleUpdateAllBacklinks.purpose: Update all existing backlinks in a project with current config

setupIPC.purpose: Setup IPC handlers for AI file operations

main/aiOutputParser.description: Shared parsers for AI transcript output.

main/apiServerManager.description: Local API Server — exposes SubFrame terminal state to external tools.

main/claudeSessionsManager.description: Claude Sessions Manager Module Reads Claude Code session history from ~/.claude/projects/ Scans individual .jsonl session files and extracts metadata

encodeProjectPath.purpose: Encode project path to Claude's directory format

extractMessageText.purpose: Extract readable text from a JSONL message field.

parseSessionFile.purpose: Parse a single .jsonl session file and extract metadata

groupSessionsBySlug.purpose: Group parsed sessions by slug (conversation chain).

getSessionsForProject.purpose: Get sessions for a given project path

applyFriendlyNames.purpose: Apply friendly names from SubFrame metadata to grouped sessions

deleteSession.purpose: Delete a session and all its JSONL segments (by slug or sessionId)

deleteAllSessions.purpose: Delete all sessions for a project

hasActiveSession.purpose: Lightweight check: does the project have any active Claude session?

getSessionNameForTerminal.purpose: falls back to an unrelated session.

refreshAccessToken.purpose: Best-effort — returns new token on success, null on failure.

persistRefreshedToken.purpose: Write refreshed token back to the credentials file so Claude Code picks it up too.

main/dialogs.description: Dialogs Module Handles system dialogs - folder picker, file dialogs

main/eventBridge.description: Event Bridge — fan-out for main→renderer broadcasts.

main/fileEditor.description: File Editor Module Handles file reading and writing for the editor overlay

isBinaryFile.purpose: Check if a file extension indicates a binary file

isImageFile.purpose: Check if a file is an image that can be previewed

readImageFile.purpose: Read an image file and return it as a base64 data URI

isWritable.purpose: Check if a file is writable by the current user

main/fileTree.description: File Tree Module Generates directory tree structure

getFileTree.purpose: Get file tree for a directory

main/frameProject.description: SubFrame Project Module Handles SubFrame project initialization and detection

isFrameProject.purpose: Check if a project is a SubFrame project

showInitializeConfirmation.purpose: Show confirmation dialog before initializing SubFrame project

initializeFrameProject.purpose: Initialize a project as SubFrame project

cleanupBackups.purpose: Called at the start of each update cycle so only the most recent backups survive.

updateSubFrameComponents.purpose: Update SubFrame components in a project. Extracted from the IPC handler for testability.

uninstallSubFrame.purpose: Safe uninstall of SubFrame from a project. Supports dry-run mode.

main/gitBranchesManager.description: Git Branches Manager Module Handles git branch and worktree operations

isWorkingTreeClean.purpose: Check if working tree is clean

getGitStatus.purpose: Get structured git status for a project

main/githubManager.description: GitHub Manager Module Handles GitHub integration using gh CLI

checkGhCli.purpose: Check if gh CLI is available

checkGitHubRepo.purpose: Check if current directory is a git repo with GitHub remote

loadIssues.purpose: Load GitHub issues for current project

loadWorkflowRuns.purpose: Load workflow runs for a specific workflow

loadWorkflows.purpose: Load GitHub Actions workflows and their recent runs

rerunWorkflow.purpose: Rerun a GitHub Actions workflow run

dispatchWorkflow.purpose: Dispatch (manually trigger) a GitHub Actions workflow

markNotificationRead.purpose: Mark a GitHub notification thread as read

main/outputChannelManager.description: Output Channel Manager — Named log channels for system/integration output. Like VS Code's Output panel — persistent named channels that collect logs from different subsystems (System, GitHub, Git, Pipeline, Agent, etc.).

main/overviewManager.description: Overview Manager Module Gathers project data for overview dashboard

loadOverview.purpose: Load overview data for a project

loadStats.purpose: Load project stats (lines of code, files, git info)

getSourceFiles.purpose: Falls back to recursive filesystem scan if not a git repo.

findFilesRecursive.purpose: Recursively find source files from project root (non-git fallback).

countLinesOfCode.purpose: Count lines of code across all source files in the project.

countFiles.purpose: Count source files in the project.

getGitActivity.purpose: Get commit activity for last 90 days (GitHub-style heatmap data)

getFileGitHistory.purpose: Get file git history (contributors, commits, blame)

getFileCommits.purpose: Get recent commits for a file

main/pipelineWorkflowParser.description: Pipeline Workflow Parser Parses YAML workflow files from .subframe/workflows/*.yml

parseWorkflow.purpose: Validates required fields: name, on, jobs.

listWorkflows.purpose: List all workflows from the .subframe/workflows/ directory of a project.

main/pluginsManager.description: Plugins Manager Module Handles Claude Code plugins - reading marketplace, installed, and enabled status

getMarketplacePlugins.purpose: Get all available plugins from marketplace

getAllPlugins.purpose: Get all plugins with their status

refreshMarketplace.purpose: Refresh marketplace plugins (git pull or clone)

main/popoutManager.description: Pop-out Terminal Manager Manages detached terminal windows for multi-monitor workflows.

main/promptLogger.description: Prompt Logger Module Logs terminal input to history file

logInput.purpose: Only called when Claude Code is active in that terminal.

main/promptsManager.description: Prompts Manager Module Handles CRUD operations for saved prompts (prompt library). Supports both project-level (.subframe/prompts.json) and global/user-level (~/.subframe/prompts.json) prompts.

readPromptsFile.purpose: Read prompts from a JSON file at the given path.

writePromptsFile.purpose: Write prompts array to a JSON file.

upsertPrompt.purpose: Save (create or update) a prompt in a given file.

removePrompt.purpose: Delete a prompt by ID from a given file.

savePrompt.purpose: Save (create or update) a project prompt

deletePrompt.purpose: Delete a project prompt by ID

seedGlobalPromptsIfNeeded.purpose: Seeds are identified by the 'starter' tag — only prompts not already present are added.

saveGlobalPrompt.purpose: Save (create or update) a global prompt

deleteGlobalPrompt.purpose: Delete a global prompt by ID

main/pty.description: PTY Management Module Handles shell spawning, input/output, and resize (single legacy terminal)

init.purpose: Initialize PTY module with window reference

main/skillsManager.description: Skills Manager Module Scans .claude/skills/ for SKILL.md files and returns skill metadata. Managed skills (sub-tasks, sub-docs, sub-audit) are compared against frameTemplates to determine health status.

parseFrontmatter.purpose: Returns { frontmatter, content } where content is the body after the closing ---.

loadSkills.purpose: Load all skills from a project's .claude/skills/ directory.

main/taskMarkdownParser.description: Task Markdown Parser Parses and serializes tasks between markdown files (with YAML frontmatter) and Task objects. Uses gray-matter for frontmatter extraction.

parseSections.purpose: Unknown sections are preserved under their heading key.

stripBlockquotes.purpose: Strip blockquote prefixes from user request text.

parseTaskMarkdown.purpose: Parse a task markdown file into a Task object.

serializeTaskMarkdown.purpose: Serialize a Task object back to markdown with YAML frontmatter.

main/webServerManager.description: Web Server Manager — serves SubFrame UI as a web app with WebSocket transport.

renderer/components/ActivityBar.description: ActivityBar — Thin bottom bar for centralized activity streams output

renderer/components/AgentStateView.description: AgentStateView — Main agent state visualization component. Panel mode: compact active session view. Full-view mode: session list + selected session timeline.

renderer/components/AgentTimeline.description: AgentTimeline — Vertical stepper/timeline showing agent execution steps. Renders step status with animated entries and auto-scroll to latest.

renderer/components/AIFilesPanel.description: AIFilesPanel — AI instruction file status and management. Shows CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, Codex wrapper status with action buttons. Includes backlink verification, config customization, update-all, .claude/ directory info section, and auto-verify on frame status change.

renderer/components/AIToolPalette.description: AIToolPalette — Overlay palette for switching AI tools. Triggered by Ctrl+. or clicking the tool indicator in ViewTabBar. Shows install status, supports per-project tool binding.

renderer/components/CommandPalette.description: CommandPalette — Floating command palette triggered by Ctrl+/. Provides quick access to actions, panel toggles, terminal commands, workspace/project switching, and settings.

renderer/components/CritiqueView.description: CritiqueView — Displays CommentArtifact[] grouped by file with severity badges.

renderer/components/Editor.description: File Editor component. Opens as a Dialog overlay for viewing and editing files with CodeMirror 6, save (Ctrl+S), dirty tracking, syntax highlighting, minimap toggle, word wrap, font size, theme switching, fullscreen, and a status bar showing cursor position.

renderer/components/ErrorBoundary.description: ErrorBoundary — Catches React render errors and displays them instead of silently unmounting the entire component tree.

renderer/components/FileTree.description: Recursive file tree component. Renders a collapsible tree of files and directories with keyboard navigation, context menus, and file-type icons.

renderer/components/GithubPanel.description: GithubPanel — GitHub issues, PRs, branches, worktrees, workflows, and notifications.

renderer/components/GracefulShutdownDial.description: GracefulShutdownDialog — UI dialog shown when closing SubFrame with active work.

renderer/components/HistoryPanel.description: HistoryPanel — Prompt history list. Loads via LOAD_PROMPT_HISTORY send/on pattern.

renderer/components/mobile/MobileApp.description: Mobile layout shell. Renders a bottom tab bar and swaps content based on the active tab. Reuses existing desktop components at full width.

renderer/components/mobile/MobileBottomN.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar. Fixed at the bottom of the viewport with five tabs: Terminal, Tasks, Panels, Activity, Settings.

renderer/components/mobile/MobileTermina.description: Mobile terminal wrapper. Renders the active terminal at full width using the existing Terminal component. Falls back to a "no terminals" message if none exist.

renderer/components/mobile/TabletApp.description: Tablet layout shell (768-1023px, web mode only). - Collapsed icon sidebar on left (54px) — tap icons to expand as overlay - Terminal area fills center - Right panel slides in as overlay from right Reuses existing Sidebar, TerminalArea, RightPanel, ActivityBar, StatusBar.

renderer/components/OnboardingDialog.description: OnboardingDialog — Multi-step dialog for project intelligence onboarding.

renderer/components/OverviewPanel.description: OverviewPanel — Dashboard view with project stats cards. Uses Framer Motion stagger animation on mount.

renderer/components/PatchReview.description: PatchReview — Displays PatchArtifact[] with diff preview and apply controls.

renderer/components/PipelinePanel.description: PipelinePanel — Main pipeline panel supporting side-panel and full-view modes. Shows workflow selector, run list, and run detail with tabs.

renderer/components/PipelineTimeline.description: PipelineTimeline — Horizontal stage flow visualization for pipeline runs. Compact mode shows a progress bar with count. Full mode shows stage nodes connected by lines with status indicators.

useElapsed.purpose: to avoid CPU waste from ticking timers on invisible components.

renderer/components/PluginsPanel.description: PluginsPanel — Plugin management with toggle controls, filter buttons, category icons, and install support.

renderer/components/PopoutTerminal.description: Pop-out terminal window UI. Renders a minimal terminal view for detached windows.

HtmlPreview.purpose: access Node.js APIs and escape the sandbox entirely.

renderer/components/PromptLibrary.description: PromptLibrary — Command-palette-style overlay for saved prompts. Triggered by Ctrl+Shift+L. Fuzzy searches across title + content + tags, inserts selected prompt into the active terminal via PTY write. Supports both global (user-level) and project-level prompts.

renderer/components/PromptsPanel.description: PromptsPanel — Right-panel view for saved prompts. Shows prompts grouped by category with inline editing, tag filtering, sort toggles, variable highlighting, keyboard navigation, and category rename. Supports both global and project-scoped prompts with scope toggle.

renderer/components/RightPanel.description: RightPanel — Container for all right-side panels.

renderer/components/SessionsPanel.description: SessionsPanel — Claude Code session list with resume, rename, delete functionality.

renderer/components/SettingsPanel.description: SettingsPanel — Settings dialog/modal with sidebar navigation.

renderer/components/ShortcutsPanel.description: ShortcutsPanel — Full-view panel for keyboard shortcuts. Replaces the old dialog modal with a VS Code-style full-panel view. Renders inside the TerminalArea full-view system (like TasksPanel, PipelinePanel).

renderer/components/SidebarAgentStatus.description: SidebarAgentStatus — Tiny status widget for the sidebar footer area. Shows a pulsing dot + current tool name when an agent session is active. Adapts to collapsed sidebar: shows icon + dot + count badge with tooltip.

renderer/components/SkillsPanel.description: SkillsPanel — Shows all .claude/skills found in the project. Each skill renders as an expandable card with command, description, allowed tools, health status, and full SKILL.md content on expand.

renderer/components/StatusBar.description: StatusBar — Persistent thin bar at the very bottom of the app (below ActivityBar).

renderer/components/StructureMap.description: Structure Map component. D3.js force-directed graph visualization of project modules. React owns the container div; D3 owns everything inside it.

getD3.purpose: Lazy getter — the CDN script may load after our bundle executes.

renderer/components/SubFrameHealthPanel.description: SubFrameHealthPanel — Health status and management for SubFrame project components. Shows per-component status grouped by category, update actions, and uninstall options.

renderer/components/SystemPanel.description: SystemPanel — App dashboard for SubFrame itself. Shows version/update status, AI tool picker, health, integrations, and quick access.

renderer/components/TaskGraph.description: TaskGraph — React Flow dependency graph with dagre auto-layout. Shows tasks as card nodes with directed edges for blocker relationships. Replaces the previous D3 force-directed implementation with proper hierarchical layout and styled card nodes.

renderer/components/TaskKanban.description: TaskKanban — Kanban board view for tasks. Full view: horizontal columns side by side. Compact/sidebar: vertical stacked sections.

renderer/components/TasksPalette.description: TasksPalette — Floating quick-task palette triggered by Ctrl+'. Provides fast search and navigation for active Sub-Tasks. Follows the same overlay pattern as CommandPalette.tsx and PromptLibrary.tsx.

renderer/components/TasksPanel.description: TasksPanel — Sub-task management with TanStack Table. Supports filtering, sorting, inline expand, add/edit/delete.

renderer/components/TaskTimeline.description: TaskTimeline — Horizontal stepper showing task step progress. Compact mode (or >7 steps) shows a progress bar with count. Full mode shows circles with connectors and labels.

renderer/components/TerminalGrid.description: Terminal grid layout component. Renders terminals in a CSS Grid with resize handles between cells. Supports drag-to-swap reordering of grid cells.

renderer/components/TerminalTabBar.description: Terminal tab bar component. Renders animated tabs with drag-to-reorder (Framer Motion), shell selector dropdown, and view mode toggle. View-switching buttons live in ViewTabBar.

ThemeProvider.purpose: Mount once in the app root — no context needed, uses useSettings() directly.

renderer/components/UpdateNotification.description: UpdateNotification — side-effect component that listens for auto-updater

renderer/components/WebServerSetup.description: WebServerSetup — Multi-step setup wizard for SubFrame Server.

renderer/components/WhatsNew.description: WhatsNew — Dialog that surfaces release notes after updates. Auto-shows when the app version is newer than the last-seen version. Also accessible via command palette.

renderer/components/WorkflowEditor.description: WorkflowEditor — Visual workflow builder + YAML editor for pipeline workflows. Follows TasksPanel's dual-mode (Form / YAML) dialog pattern.

renderer/global.d.description: Global window augmentations for SubFrame renderer

renderer/hooks/useActivity.description: TanStack Query hook for activity streams.

renderer/hooks/useAgentState.description: TanStack Query hook for real-time agent state visualization. Wraps LOAD_AGENT_STATE (send/on) + WATCH/UNWATCH lifecycle.

useAgentState.purpose: fresh via IPC events pushed from the main process file watcher.

renderer/hooks/useAIFiles.description: TanStack Query hook for AI files status (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md). Uses the send/on pattern since GET_AI_FILES_STATUS is a send channel. Also provides backlink verification, config loading/saving, and update-all.

renderer/hooks/useFileTree.description: TanStack Query hook for file tree data. Sends LOAD_FILE_TREE and listens for FILE_TREE_DATA events.

renderer/hooks/useGithub.description: TanStack Query hooks for GitHub integration (issues, branches, worktrees).

renderer/hooks/useIpc.description: React Query hook for typed IPC invoke calls. Wraps ipcRenderer.invoke with TanStack React Query for caching and refetching.

useIpcQuery.purpose: Automatically creates a queryKey from the channel + args.

useIpcMutation.purpose: Useful for write operations like UPDATE_SETTING, SET_AI_TOOL, etc.

renderer/hooks/useIPCListener.description: React hook that listens for main->renderer IPC events

renderer/hooks/useOnboarding.description: React hook for onboarding IPC calls.

renderer/hooks/useOutputChannels.description: TanStack Query hooks for Output Channels.

renderer/hooks/useOverview.description: TanStack Query hook for project overview data.

renderer/hooks/usePipeline.description: TanStack Query hooks for pipeline management. Wraps PIPELINE_LIST_RUNS (send/on) + PIPELINE_START, PIPELINE_CANCEL, etc. mutations.

usePipeline.purpose: Query hook that loads pipeline runs via send/on pattern and keeps cache fresh via IPC events.

usePipelineWorkflows.purpose: Query hook for available workflow definitions.

usePipelineProgress.purpose: Hook that listens to PIPELINE_PROGRESS events and maintains a log buffer per stage.

renderer/hooks/usePlugins.description: TanStack Query hook for plugin management.

renderer/hooks/usePrompts.description: TanStack Query hooks for the prompt library. Supports both project-level and global (user-level) prompts.

renderer/hooks/useSessions.description: TanStack Query hook for Claude Code sessions.

renderer/hooks/useSettings.description: TanStack Query hook for settings management.

renderer/hooks/useSkills.description: TanStack Query hook for loading Claude Code skills.

renderer/hooks/useSubFrameHealth.description: TanStack Query hook for SubFrame health status. Uses the send/on pattern since GET_SUBFRAME_HEALTH is a send channel. Provides health status, component updates, and uninstall mutations.

renderer/hooks/useTasks.description: TanStack Query hooks for sub-task management. Wraps LOAD_TASKS (send/on) + ADD_TASK, UPDATE_TASK, DELETE_TASK mutations.

useTasks.purpose: Query hook that loads tasks via send/on pattern and keeps cache fresh via IPC events.

renderer/hooks/useTerminal.description: Custom hook for attaching persistent xterm.js terminals to React containers.

useTerminal.purpose: The terminal survives unmount — only detaches from the DOM, preserving scrollback.

renderer/hooks/useUpdater.description: TanStack Query hook for auto-updater state management. Listens for status/progress events from the main process and exposes mutations for check, download, and install actions.

renderer/hooks/useViewport.description: Responsive viewport hook for mobile/tablet/desktop detection. Only active in web mode — Electron always reports 'desktop'.

getLanguageExtension.purpose: or null if the file type is not recognized. Results are cached per extension.

getBaseExtensions.purpose: Does NOT include theme or language — those are added separately.

getMinimapExtension.purpose: Returns a minimap extension (enabled or empty).

getFontSizeExtension.purpose: to prevent selection highlight offset (CM6 computes selection rects from content metrics). */

getJsonLinter.purpose: Returns a linter extension that validates JSON syntax using JSON.parse.

getIndentExtension.purpose: Returns extensions that configure tab size and indent unit.

renderer/lib/electronTransport.description: Electron transport — wraps ipcRenderer, shell, and clipboard.

sanitizeForIPC.purpose: Does NOT recurse into class instances, Maps, Sets, etc. to avoid infinite loops.

renderer/lib/ipc.description: Typed IPC helpers for the renderer process.

typedInvoke.purpose: Type-safe invoke — request/response via the active transport.

typedSend.purpose: Type-safe send — fire-and-forget via the active transport.

renderer/lib/promptUtils.description: Shared prompt utilities. Extracted from PromptLibrary.tsx and PromptsPanel.tsx to eliminate duplication.

params: appends carriage return to execute immediately (Shift+Click

sendCommandToTerminal.purpose: Returns true if the command was sent successfully.

renderer/lib/shortcuts.description: Centralized keyboard shortcut registry. Single source of truth for all keyboard shortcuts in SubFrame.

renderer/lib/terminalNames.description: Terminal name generator — curated codenames for new terminals.

generateTerminalName.purpose: Draws from a shuffled pool. If the name is already taken, appends -2, -3, etc.

getUsedTerminalNames.purpose: Pass the terminals Map from useTerminalStore.

renderer/lib/transportProvider.description: Transport provider — global singleton for the active transport.

renderer/lib/webSocketTransport.description: WebSocket transport — connects to SubFrame Server via WebSocket.

renderer/web-entry.description: Web-mode entry point for SubFrame Server.

shared/activityTypes.description: Activity Streams — Shared types for the centralized execution/output system.

shared/agentStateTypes.description: Agent State Types — Real-time agent/session visualization

shared/backlinkUtils.description: Backlink Utilities Manages backlink blocks in native AI instruction files (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) Backlinks reference AGENTS.md without replacing user content

getBacklinkBlock.purpose: Get the full backlink block to inject into native AI files

hasBacklink.purpose: Check if a file already contains the backlink marker

injectBacklink.purpose: Inject backlink block at the top of a file (idempotent)

updateBacklink.purpose: Update an existing backlink block in a file (replace in-place)

removeBacklink.purpose: Remove the backlink block from a file, preserving all other content

isSymlinkFile.purpose: Check if a file is a symlink

getNativeFileStatus.purpose: Get the status of a native AI file (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md)

getClaudeNativeStatus.purpose: Get the status of Claude Code's native .claude/ directory

getBacklinkTarget.purpose: Extract the backlink target path from a file's backlink block

verifyNativeFile.purpose: Verify a single native AI file's backlink status

collectNativeFileIssues.purpose: Collect issues for a native AI file and push them to the result

verifyBacklinks.purpose: Verify backlink health for all AI files in a project

shared/claudeSettingsUtils.description: Claude Settings Utilities Safe read/write/merge of .claude/settings.json for SubFrame hook deployment. SubFrame hooks are identified by the ".subframe/hooks/" prefix in the command field.

readClaudeSettings.purpose: Read .claude/settings.json safely. Returns empty object if missing/invalid.

isSubFrameHook.purpose: Check if a hook entry is a SubFrame hook (command starts with .subframe/hooks/).

hasSubFrameHooks.purpose: Check if the given settings already contain SubFrame hooks.

getSubFrameHookCoverage.purpose: Returns detailed coverage info: which are configured, which are missing.

mergeSubFrameHooks.purpose: If SubFrame hooks already exist, they are replaced with the new ones.

removeSubFrameHooks.purpose: Returns a new settings object with SubFrame hooks stripped.

shared/frameTemplates.description: SubFrame Templates Templates for auto-generated SubFrame project files Each template includes instructions header for Claude Code

getLogoSVG.purpose: Generate the animated atom logo SVG at any size.

shared/projectInit.description: SubFrame Project Initialization (Pure Node.js) Core init logic shared between the Electron app and the CLI. No Electron dependencies — safe to require from plain Node.js.

shared/subframeHealth.description: SubFrame Health Checking Evaluates the deployment status of all SubFrame components in a project. Used by the health panel to show what's installed, outdated, or missing.

isVersionOlder.purpose: Returns true if `deployed` is older than `current`.

checkComponent.purpose: Check if a single component is current (content matches template).

getSubFrameHealth.purpose: Get the full SubFrame health status for a project.

getComponentRegistry.purpose: Get the component registry (for use by update handlers).

getHooksDir.purpose: Get the hooks directory path constant.

shared/themeTypes.description: SubFrame Theme System — Type definitions and built-in presets.

shared/transport.description: Transport abstraction — unifies Electron IPC and WebSocket communication.

shared/wsProtocol.description: WebSocket protocol message types for SubFrame Server.

renderer/components/EmbeddedTerminal.description: EmbeddedTerminal — attaches a real terminal registry entry into any container.

renderer/components/SessionControlBanner.description: SessionControlBanner — shown at top of main content when a web client is connected.

RESTART_TERMINAL.name: restart-terminal
RESTART_TERMINAL.description: Restart PTY with new working directory

TERMINAL_OUTPUT.name: terminal-output
TERMINAL_OUTPUT.description: PTY output to display in terminal

CHECK_FRAME_PROJECT.name: check-frame-project
CHECK_FRAME_PROJECT.description: Check if directory is a Frame project

WORKSPACE_LIST.name: workspace-list
WORKSPACE_LIST.description: Get list of all workspaces with active key

WORKSPACE_SWITCH.name: workspace-switch
WORKSPACE_SWITCH.description: Switch active workspace, returns project list

WORKSPACE_CREATE.name: workspace-create
WORKSPACE_CREATE.description: Create new workspace, returns updated workspace list

LOAD_CLAUDE_SESSIONS.name: load-claude-sessions
LOAD_CLAUDE_SESSIONS.description: Load Claude Code sessions grouped by conversation chain

CHECK_ACTIVE_CLAUDE_SESSION.name: check-active-claude-session
CHECK_ACTIVE_CLAUDE_SESSION.description: Lightweight check if project has active session (file mtime only)

circularDependencies.issue: esbuild bundler renames modules when circular dependencies exist (e.g., terminal → terminal2)
circularDependencies.solution: Use window.terminalSendCommand global function instead of direct import
circularDependencies.pattern: Expose functions on window object for cross-module communication that would cause circular deps

ipcVsGlobal.useGlobal: For renderer ↔ renderer communication that would cause circular dependency

activity.description: Activity Manager — Centralized execution/output manager for SubFrame. Every long-running operation creates an ActivityStream that routes output through a unified channel with throttled IPC broadcasts.

activity-bar.description: ActivityBar — Thin bottom bar for centralized activity streams output and output channel viewer. Collapsed: single row showing active stream status + latest log line. Expanded: tabbed view with two modes: - "Activity" — per-stream output logs with cancel controls - "Output"   — VS Code-style output channels viewer

activity-types.description: Activity Streams — Shared types for the centralized execution/output system. Every long-running operation (AI tool, pipeline stage, onboarding, script) creates an ActivityStream that routes output through a unified channel.

agent-state.description: Agent State Manager Module Watches .subframe/agent-state.json for changes and broadcasts real-time agent state updates to the renderer via IPC.

agent-state-types.description: Agent State Types — Real-time agent/session visualization

agent-state-view.description: AgentStateView — Main agent state visualization component. Panel mode: compact active session view. Full-view mode: session list + selected session timeline.

agent-timeline.description: AgentTimeline — Vertical stepper/timeline showing agent execution steps. Renders step status with animated entries and auto-scroll to latest.

ai-files.description: AI Files Manager Module Handles native AI instruction file operations (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) Manages backlink injection, removal, symlink migration, and status checks

ai-output-parser.description: Shared parsers for AI transcript output. Interactive sessions often contain prompt echoes, banners, and shell text around the actual final JSON result.

ai-tool.description: AI Tool Manager Manages switching between different AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex CLI, etc.)

aifiles.description: AIFilesPanel — AI instruction file status and management. Shows CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, Codex wrapper status with action buttons. Includes backlink verification, config customization, update-all, .claude/ directory info section, and auto-verify on frame status change.

aitool-palette.description: AIToolPalette — Overlay palette for switching AI tools. Triggered by Ctrl+. or clicking the tool indicator in ViewTabBar. Shows install status, supports per-project tool binding.

api-server.description: Local API Server — exposes SubFrame terminal state to external tools.

backlink-utils.description: Backlink Utilities Manages backlink blocks in native AI instruction files (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md) Backlinks reference AGENTS.md without replacing user content

claude-sessions.description: Claude Sessions Manager Module Reads Claude Code session history from ~/.claude/projects/ Scans individual .jsonl session files and extracts metadata

claude-settings-utils.description: Claude Settings Utilities Safe read/write/merge of .claude/settings.json for SubFrame hook deployment. SubFrame hooks are identified by the ".subframe/hooks/" prefix in the command field.

command-palette.description: CommandPalette — Floating command palette triggered by Ctrl+/. Provides quick access to actions, panel toggles, terminal commands, workspace/project switching, and settings.

critique-view.description: CritiqueView — Displays CommentArtifact[] grouped by file with severity badges.

dialogs.description: Dialogs Module Handles system dialogs - folder picker, file dialogs

editor.description: File Editor component. Opens as a Dialog overlay for viewing and editing files with CodeMirror 6, save (Ctrl+S), dirty tracking, syntax highlighting, minimap toggle, word wrap, font size, theme switching, fullscreen, and a status bar showing cursor position.

electron-transport.description: Electron transport — wraps ipcRenderer, shell, and clipboard.

error-boundary.description: ErrorBoundary — Catches React render errors and displays them instead of silently unmounting the entire component tree.

event-bridge.description: Event Bridge — fan-out for main→renderer broadcasts.

file-editor.description: File Editor Module Handles file reading and writing for the editor overlay

file-tree.description: File Tree Module Generates directory tree structure
Recursive file tree component. Renders a collapsible tree of files and directories with keyboard navigation, context menus, and file-type icons.

frame-config.description: SubFrame Project Module Handles SubFrame project initialization and detection
SubFrame Constants Configuration constants for SubFrame project management
SubFrame Templates Templates for auto-generated SubFrame project files Each template includes instructions header for Claude Code

git-branches.description: Git Branches Manager Module Handles git branch and worktree operations

github.description: GitHub Manager Module Handles GitHub integration using gh CLI
GithubPanel — GitHub issues, PRs, branches, worktrees, workflows, and notifications.

global.d.description: Global window augmentations for SubFrame renderer

graceful-shutdown-dialog.description: GracefulShutdownDialog — UI dialog shown when closing SubFrame with active work.

history.description: Prompt Logger Module Logs terminal input to history file
HistoryPanel — Prompt history list. Loads via LOAD_PROMPT_HISTORY send/on pattern.

index.description: Main Process Entry Point Initializes Electron app, creates window, loads modules

ipc.description: Typed IPC helpers for the renderer process.
IPC Channel Constants — TypeScript Edition Single source of truth for all IPC channel names and their type signatures.

menu.description: Application Menu Module Defines menu structure and handlers Supports dynamic menu based on active AI tool

mobile-app.description: Mobile layout shell. Renders a bottom tab bar and swaps content based on the active tab. Reuses existing desktop components at full width.

mobile-bottom-nav.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar. Fixed at the bottom of the viewport with five tabs: Terminal, Tasks, Panels, Activity, Settings.

mobile-terminal-wrapper.description: Mobile terminal wrapper. Renders the active terminal at full width using the existing Terminal component. Falls back to a "no terminals" message if none exist.

onboarding.description: Onboarding Manager Detects existing project intelligence files, runs AI analysis through a terminal tab, parses the JSON response, and imports results into SubFrame's spec files.

onboarding-dialog.description: OnboardingDialog — Multi-step dialog for project intelligence onboarding.

output-channel.description: Output Channel Manager — Named log channels for system/integration output. Like VS Code's Output panel — persistent named channels that collect logs from different subsystems (System, GitHub, Git, Pipeline, Agent, etc.).

overview.description: Overview Manager Module Gathers project data for overview dashboard
OverviewPanel — Dashboard view with project stats cards. Uses Framer Motion stagger animation on mount.

patch-review.description: PatchReview — Displays PatchArtifact[] with diff preview and apply controls.

pipeline.description: Pipeline Manager Module Orchestrates pipeline runs: parses workflows, executes jobs/stages, handles approval gates, and pushes progress events to the renderer.
PipelinePanel — Main pipeline panel supporting side-panel and full-view modes. Shows workflow selector, run list, and run detail with tabs.

pipeline-stages.description: Pipeline Stage Handlers Built-in stage implementations for the pipeline system.

pipeline-timeline.description: PipelineTimeline — Horizontal stage flow visualization for pipeline runs. Compact mode shows a progress bar with count. Full mode shows stage nodes connected by lines with status indicators.

pipeline-workflow-parser.description: Pipeline Workflow Parser Parses YAML workflow files from .subframe/workflows/*.yml

plugins.description: Plugins Manager Module Handles Claude Code plugins - reading marketplace, installed, and enabled status
PluginsPanel — Plugin management with toggle controls, filter buttons, category icons, and install support.

popout.description: Pop-out Terminal Manager Manages detached terminal windows for multi-monitor workflows.

popout-terminal.description: Pop-out terminal window UI. Renders a minimal terminal view for detached windows.

project-init.description: SubFrame Project Initialization (Pure Node.js) Core init logic shared between the Electron app and the CLI. No Electron dependencies — safe to require from plain Node.js.

prompt-library.description: PromptLibrary — Command-palette-style overlay for saved prompts. Triggered by Ctrl+Shift+L. Fuzzy searches across title + content + tags, inserts selected prompt into the active terminal via PTY write. Supports both global (user-level) and project-level prompts.

prompt-utils.description: Shared prompt utilities. Extracted from PromptLibrary.tsx and PromptsPanel.tsx to eliminate duplication.

prompts.description: Prompts Manager Module Handles CRUD operations for saved prompts (prompt library). Supports both project-level (.subframe/prompts.json) and global/user-level (~/.subframe/prompts.json) prompts.

PromptsPanel — Right-panel view for saved prompts. Shows prompts grouped by category with inline editing, tag filtering, sort toggles, variable highlighting, keyboard navigation, and category rename. Supports both global and project-scoped prompts with scope toggle.

right.description: RightPanel — Container for all right-side panels. Panels are grouped: solo panels show a title header, grouped panels show only their group's tabs. Terminal bar buttons map to groups: - Sub-Tasks → solo - Agent → activity, sessions, history, prompts, skills, plugins (tabbed) - GitHub → issues, PRs, branches, worktrees (tabbed) - Overview → full-view (handled by TerminalArea, not here)

sessions.description: SessionsPanel — Claude Code session list with resume, rename, delete functionality.

settings.description: Settings Manager Manages application settings stored in frame-settings.json
SettingsPanel — Settings dialog/modal with sidebar navigation. Opens via useUIStore.settingsOpen.

shortcuts.description: ShortcutsPanel — Full-view panel for keyboard shortcuts. Replaces the old dialog modal with a VS Code-style full-panel view. Renders inside the TerminalArea full-view system (like TasksPanel, PipelinePanel).
Centralized keyboard shortcut registry. Single source of truth for all keyboard shortcuts in SubFrame.

sidebar-agent-status.description: SidebarAgentStatus — Tiny status widget for the sidebar footer area. Shows a pulsing dot + current tool name when an agent session is active. Adapts to collapsed sidebar: shows icon + dot + count badge with tooltip.

skills.description: Skills Manager Module Scans .claude/skills/ for SKILL.md files and returns skill metadata. Managed skills (sub-tasks, sub-docs, sub-audit) are compared against frameTemplates to determine health status.
SkillsPanel — Shows all .claude/skills found in the project. Each skill renders as an expandable card with command, description, allowed tools, health status, and full SKILL.md content on expand.

status-bar.description: StatusBar — Persistent thin bar at the very bottom of the app (below ActivityBar). Shows at-a-glance status from multiple subsystems: git, agents, tasks, GitHub, output. Each section is clickable to open its corresponding right panel.

structure-map.description: Structure Map component. D3.js force-directed graph visualization of project modules. React owns the container div; D3 owns everything inside it.

sub-frame-health.description: SubFrameHealthPanel — Health status and management for SubFrame project components. Shows per-component status grouped by category, update actions, and uninstall options.

subframe-health.description: SubFrame Health Checking Evaluates the deployment status of all SubFrame components in a project. Used by the health panel to show what's installed, outdated, or missing.

system.description: SystemPanel — App dashboard for SubFrame itself. Shows version/update status, AI tool picker, health, integrations, and quick access.

tablet-app.description: Tablet layout shell (768-1023px, web mode only). - Collapsed icon sidebar on left (54px) — tap icons to expand as overlay - Terminal area fills center - Right panel slides in as overlay from right Reuses existing Sidebar, TerminalArea, RightPanel, ActivityBar, StatusBar.

task-graph.description: TaskGraph — React Flow dependency graph with dagre auto-layout. Shows tasks as card nodes with directed edges for blocker relationships. Replaces the previous D3 force-directed implementation with proper hierarchical layout and styled card nodes.

task-kanban.description: TaskKanban — Kanban board view for tasks. Full view: horizontal columns side by side. Compact/sidebar: vertical stacked sections.

task-markdown-parser.description: Task Markdown Parser Parses and serializes tasks between markdown files (with YAML frontmatter) and Task objects. Uses gray-matter for frontmatter extraction.

task-timeline.description: TaskTimeline — Horizontal stepper showing task step progress. Compact mode (or >7 steps) shows a progress bar with count. Full mode shows circles with connectors and labels.

tasks.description: Tasks Manager Module Handles task CRUD operations for SubFrame projects.
TasksPanel — Sub-task management with TanStack Table. Supports filtering, sorting, inline expand, add/edit/delete.

tasks-palette.description: TasksPalette — Floating quick-task palette triggered by Ctrl+'. Provides fast search and navigation for active Sub-Tasks. Follows the same overlay pattern as CommandPalette.tsx and PromptLibrary.tsx.

terminal.description: PTY Management Module Handles shell spawning, input/output, and resize (single legacy terminal)
PTY Manager Module Manages multiple PTY instances for multi-terminal support
Single terminal component. Wraps xterm.js via useTerminal hook. Connects IPC for I/O, provides context menu, scroll-to-bottom button with animation, live output overlay, and inline search.
Terminal grid layout component. Renders terminals in a CSS Grid with resize handles between cells. Supports drag-to-swap reordering of grid cells.
Terminal tab bar component. Renders animated tabs with drag-to-reorder (Framer Motion), shell selector dropdown, and view mode toggle. View-switching buttons live in ViewTabBar.

terminal-area.description: Terminal area orchestrator. Renders the tab bar and either a single terminal (tabs mode) or the terminal grid (grid mode). Manages terminal creation/destruction via IPC and keyboard shortcuts. Scopes terminals per-project with hot-swap.

terminal-names.description: Terminal name generator — curated codenames for new terminals.

terminal-registry.description: Persistent terminal instance registry. Decouples xterm.js Terminal lifecycle from React component mount/unmount.

theme-types.description: SubFrame Theme System — Type definitions and built-in presets.

transport.description: Transport abstraction — unifies Electron IPC and WebSocket communication.

transport-provider.description: Transport provider — global singleton for the active transport.

update-notification.description: UpdateNotification — side-effect component that listens for auto-updater events and shows non-intrusive sonner toasts. Renders null.

updater.description: Updater Manager Handles automatic update checks, downloads, and installation via electron-updater. In dev mode (app.isPackaged === false), all operations are no-ops.

use-activity.description: TanStack Query hook for activity streams. Wraps ACTIVITY_LIST (invoke) + ACTIVITY_STATUS / ACTIVITY_OUTPUT (events).

use-agent-state.description: TanStack Query hook for real-time agent state visualization. Wraps LOAD_AGENT_STATE (send/on) + WATCH/UNWATCH lifecycle.

use-aifiles.description: TanStack Query hook for AI files status (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md). Uses the send/on pattern since GET_AI_FILES_STATUS is a send channel. Also provides backlink verification, config loading/saving, and update-all.

use-file-tree.description: TanStack Query hook for file tree data. Sends LOAD_FILE_TREE and listens for FILE_TREE_DATA events.

use-github.description: TanStack Query hooks for GitHub integration (issues, branches, worktrees).

use-ipc.description: React Query hook for typed IPC invoke calls. Wraps ipcRenderer.invoke with TanStack React Query for caching and refetching.

use-ipclistener.description: React hook that listens for main->renderer IPC events and optionally invalidates React Query caches.

use-onboarding.description: React hook for onboarding IPC calls. Wraps project intelligence detection, AI analysis, and import using TanStack Query mutations and IPC event listeners.

use-output-channels.description: TanStack Query hooks for Output Channels.

use-overview.description: TanStack Query hook for project overview data.

use-pipeline.description: TanStack Query hooks for pipeline management. Wraps PIPELINE_LIST_RUNS (send/on) + PIPELINE_START, PIPELINE_CANCEL, etc. mutations.

use-plugins.description: TanStack Query hook for plugin management.

use-prompts.description: TanStack Query hooks for the prompt library. Supports both project-level and global (user-level) prompts.

use-sessions.description: TanStack Query hook for Claude Code sessions.

use-settings.description: TanStack Query hook for settings management.

use-skills.description: TanStack Query hook for loading Claude Code skills.

use-sub-frame-health.description: TanStack Query hook for SubFrame health status. Uses the send/on pattern since GET_SUBFRAME_HEALTH is a send channel. Provides health status, component updates, and uninstall mutations.

use-tasks.description: TanStack Query hooks for sub-task management. Wraps LOAD_TASKS (send/on) + ADD_TASK, UPDATE_TASK, DELETE_TASK mutations.

use-terminal.description: Custom hook for attaching persistent xterm.js terminals to React containers.

use-updater.description: TanStack Query hook for auto-updater state management. Listens for status/progress events from the main process and exposes mutations for check, download, and install actions.

use-viewport.description: Responsive viewport hook for mobile/tablet/desktop detection. Only active in web mode — Electron always reports 'desktop'.

web-entry.description: Web-mode entry point for SubFrame Server.

web-server.description: Web Server Manager — serves SubFrame UI as a web app with WebSocket transport.

web-server-setup.description: WebServerSetup — Multi-step setup wizard for SubFrame Server.

web-socket-transport.description: WebSocket transport — connects to SubFrame Server via WebSocket.

whats-new.description: WhatsNew — Dialog that surfaces release notes after updates. Auto-shows when the app version is newer than the last-seen version. Also accessible via command palette.

workflow-editor.description: WorkflowEditor — Visual workflow builder + YAML editor for pipeline workflows. Follows TasksPanel's dual-mode (Form / YAML) dialog pattern.

workspace.description: Workspace Module Manages workspace configuration in ~/.subframe/workspaces.json

ws-protocol.description: WebSocket protocol message types for SubFrame Server.
